localizations.title: The Seventh Screening
localizations.hint_1: This dog food would leave no canine unmoved.
localizations.hint_4_first: Ah! Looks like there's an available seat on the left.
localizations.hint_4: Too bad a head hides the number of the available seat in the row numbered 40 and up.
localizations.hint_5: A key should suffice to open this door.
localizations.hint_6: What should you do before entering the home of a stranger?
localizations.hint_8: You need to find something to help you go down. Otherwise, you might end up as white as a sheet.
localizations.hint_9_first: Don't you feel peckish after all these twists and turns?
localizations.hint_9: This bucket of Popcorn around the number is completely empty.
localizations.hint_10: Choose wisely what you wish to cut with this ax.
localizations.hint_11_first: The other team has information concerning the opening of this door. It is behind "The Little Wolf" painting.
localizations.hint_11: The 4 moon symbols on this door correspond to specific spots (row and column) that the other team must communicate to you.
localizations.hint_12: What could you hang on this pulley?
localizations.hint_13: This key opens the door to the haunted room that the butler mentioned to you. Combine it with the room when you find it.
localizations.hint_14: Did you take card P? Oh, look, how beautiful this full moon is!
localizations.hint_15: Find something to crush this monster.
localizations.hint_17: This sheet proves beyond the shadow of a doubt that the manor is not haunted. It looks rather strong.
localizations.hint_19: This magnet is powerful enough to pull a metal object to the surface.
localizations.hint_25: You'll be able to access this cellar after clearing the entrance, but not with your bare hands.
localizations.hint_28: This will probably be very useful for the grand finale.
localizations.hint_30: Did you take card 13? Use the manor's layout to find the haunted room.
localizations.hint_43: Did you take cards 14 and R?
localizations.hint_47: The butler has some similarities with a lycanthrope.
localizations.hint_50: This curtain is like a skating rink. Perfect to knock someone over.
localizations.hint_51: The vacuum cleaner can be used as a weapon when dealing with some creatures.
localizations.hint_52: Gloves with bladed fingertips… Scary! But they could come in handy.
localizations.hint_54_first: The other team will tell you what to do with this painting.
localizations.hint_54: The message "On the Wolf's back" lets you know that you must look at the back of the painting… But how do you go about it?
localizations.hint_61: You must have within reach a card to make this oaf sit.
localizations.hint_62: The bait mechanism is set. Now, you must find something to lure the mean werewolf.
localizations.hint_63: The werewolf is too far away to be lured. You must spread the smell.
localizations.hint_66: Did you take cards 17, 28, and K?
localizations.hint_67_first: This is not the first time you come across these candles.
localizations.hint_67: Take into account the candles of the movie poster and the message in the drawer to find the 2 candles to be lit.
localizations.hint_70: It's always good to know that you'll find something to nibble on if you  feel like it.
localizations.hint_73: You will find farther in this adventure something that will extract this key from the vase.
localizations.hint_77: Did you take cards 12 and X?
localizations.hint_79: There is a similar message on some of the cards of the deck.
localizations.hint_91: Don't you like this ending? Is it possible that another ending is hidden in this adventure?
localizations.hint_92: There must be a lock in which this key can fit in.
localizations.hint_93_first: As the werewolf is chasing the poor child, the stars keep their peaceful trajectories.
localizations.hint_93: By flipping the top of the deck, back side, with your finger, you see the moon form something in the sky.
localizations.hint_99_first: The other team will need information about these symbols.
localizations.hint_99: Some of these moons point at the right spots (row and column) to open the door of the other team.
localizations.hint_100_first: The left team must see what these 3 cables are connected to. Only one of them is relevant to you.
localizations.hint_100: Take the time to observe how these cables are positioned: the double cable is in front of the others. How does the other team see it?
localizations.hint_666: You must litteraly look "behind him" to access the house.
localizations.answer_hint_4: The seat between numbers 42 and 44 is the only available one.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Open the door (5) using the key (92) you retrieved from the vase.
localizations.answer_hint_6: Knock 3 times at the door by tapping on the screen to signal your presence.
localizations.answer_hint_8: Using the strong sheet (17), you escape through the window (8).
localizations.answer_hint_9: Go to the machine (70) and fill your bucket with Popcorn (9). Take card 79 and continue this epic adventure.
localizations.answer_hint_11: The 4 spots are: 2nd row 4th column (crescent moon facing to the right) / 2nd row 1st column (crescent moon facing to the left) / 3rd row 3rd column (half-moon facing to the right) / 1st row 2nd column (crescent moon facing to the left).
localizations.answer_hint_12: To set up your bait, start by hanging the shower curtain (50) on this pulley (12).
localizations.answer_hint_13: Straight ahead, first right, left then right, then straight ahead. This leads to the room +2 to be opened with the key (13).
localizations.answer_hint_15: Use the vacuum cleaner (51) to get rid of the ghost (15).
localizations.answer_hint_17: Show the sheet (17) to the butler (30) to prove to him that the room was not haunted.
localizations.answer_hint_19: This magnet (19) enables you to pull the key outside the vase (73).
localizations.answer_hint_25: Use the gloves with the bladed fingertips (52) to clear the cellar door (25).
localizations.answer_hint_30: Show the sheet (17) to the butler (30) to prove to him that the room was not haunted.
localizations.answer_hint_47: Drag the butler (47) under the glare of the full moon (14) to reveal his true nature.
localizations.answer_hint_54: Direct the screen of your device to the floor for looking at the back of the painting.
localizations.answer_hint_61: There is a card in the deck with its back reading: "Shush, sit down!". Take that to make the spectator sit down.
localizations.answer_hint_62: Place the dog food (1) on the bait (62) to lure the werewolf.
localizations.answer_hint_63: To spread the smell of the dog food (63) use the fan (28) to lure the werewolf.
localizations.answer_hint_67: "Blood and frog" are a reference to the red and green candles from the poster. When looking closely at their shapes, you understand that only the 2nd and the 5th candles are to be lit.
localizations.answer_hint_79: Look closely at how the letters are written. You make out the name "ODILE" with the "D" and the "E" written backward.
localizations.answer_hint_91: Look for the card "What kind of ending is that?!" in the deck then flip it.
localizations.answer_hint_93: The moon forms numbers 22, 6, then 0. Enter code 260 to put back the film in sequential order.
localizations.answer_hint_100: The chandelier hanging over the zombies is that of the left cable (+50). Use the ax (10) to cut it.
localizations.answer_hint_666: The access to the house is behind "me"… e.g.; the card! Flip it. Number 6 is visible on the door.
localizations.machine_6: After a short wait, you hear footsteps coming closer. Someone opens the door for you.
localizations.machine_54: You flip the painting and find strange inscriptions.
localizations.machine_67: You light the correct 2 candles which activate a mechanism behind the mirror.
localizations.machine_11: These 4 keys unblock the latch, the door opens.
localizations.event_1: In front of the movie theater, you find tonight's movie poster. Take the movie poster in the box and unfold it.
localizations.machine_93_title: You must find the number of the correct reel.
localizations.machine_93_end:
You carefully put the clips back in sequence and show on the screen the film’s correct ending. Such an ingenious trap could only work. The werewolf/butler rushed greedily at the bait. In his frantic race, his paws got stuck in the shower curtain and he fell to the floor, knocked unconscious. Our heroes had no difficulty in handing him over to the police. How lucky they were!
THE END.

What an incredible movie, can’t wait for "The Return of the Last Night of the Werewolf"!
